summary: CRM Global Clean Home Phase 2 - Invoices & Stripe Checkout module testing completed. All 47 backend tests passed (22 CRM + 25 invoices). All frontend pages load correctly. Fixed 1 backend bug (paid_at None comparison in financial stats).
critical_code_review_comments: FIX APPLIED: invoices.py line 339 - paid_at could be None, causing TypeError in financial stats calculation. Fixed by adding null check before comparison.
seed_data_creation: Created test leads, quotes, and invoices via API tests. Stripe checkout sessions created with test key.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 invoicing module fully tested. Stripe integration uses test key (sk_test_emergent). All invoice CRUD operations work. Checkout creates real Stripe sessions. Financial stats fixed for null paid_at handling.

backend_invoices: POST /api/invoices/from-quote/{quote_id} - Creates invoice from quote with TVA calculation
GET /api/invoices/{id}/payment-status - Returns payment status from Stripe
GET /api/stats/financial - Returns revenue stats with period filter
Invoice duplicate prevention - Returns existing invoice for same quote
Paid invoice checkout blocked - Returns 400 for already paid invoices
backend_crm: All 22 CRM API tests from previous iteration passed
frontend: Login page with Google OAuth button
Dashboard with KPI cards, charts, recent leads
Sidebar with Factures (data-testid='nav-invoices') and Finance (data-testid='nav-finance') nav items
Invoices page (/invoices) with filters, summary cards, invoice table, Pay button
Financial Dashboard (/finance) with KPIs, AreaChart, BarChart, transactions
Quotes page with 'Créer une facture' button on sent/accepted quotes
Payment Success page (/invoices/:id/success) with verification UI
All existing pages still work (kanban, leads, tasks, analytics, activity)

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In invoices.py line 339, the code compared paid_at dates using string comparison. However, paid invoices could have paid_at=None (key exists but value is None), causing 'TypeError: '<=' not supported between instances of 'str' and 'NoneType'
reproduction_steps: 3. In paid list filter, invoice with status='payée' but paid_at=None (edge case)
5. inv.get('paid_at', '') returns None (not empty string) when key exists with None value
6. String comparison with None raises TypeError
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed line 339 from 'if day_start.isoformat() <= inv.get("paid_at", "") < day_end.isoformat()' to 'if inv.get("paid_at") and day_start.isoformat() <= inv.get("paid_at") < day_end.isoformat()'
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 3 financial stats tests now pass (7d, 30d, 90d periods)
